description: Renovate config for Magpie. Defaults to quarterly cadence per docs/dependency-pins.md §1; load-bearing deps move to continuous and stable low-velocity deps move to opportunistic via packageRules below. Security advisories always fire ASAP via vulnerabilityAlerts. Every PR goes through admission-workflow review (automerge disabled globally) per docs/dependency-admission.md §4.
schedule: before 5am on the first day of march, june, september, december

packageRules.description: Continuous cadence — load-bearing primary deps per dependency-pins.md. PR on every upstream release.
Opportunistic cadence — stable, low-velocity. Renovate fires on security advisories via the top-level vulnerabilityAlerts; otherwise quiet.
Font assets — only bump on operator-visible issues (manual). No auto-PRs.
Pinned indefinitely per dependency-pins.md §2.1 — unmaintained upstream or replaced in a future phase. Manual review only.
GitHub Actions pins (osv-scanner-action, cargo-deny-action, setup-uv, rust-cache, actions/checkout) — opportunistic per dependency-pins.md §5.
Type-only @types/* packages — bump opportunistically when the typed library moves.
Test framework cluster — group vitest + jsdom + @testing-library/* into one quarterly PR since they tend to need to bump together.
Vite + plugins — group so vite's plugin ecosystem moves in lockstep.
ESLint + plugins — same logic as vite group.
